MINI MINUTES: Judge A. James Robertson; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mary Elizabeth Inn is present. Represented by Tan Kairy.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for plaintiff.
Defendant Carrie Black is present.
Attorney Matthew Show representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of May 13, 2013 vacated. (501/JPT)
